subject: [PATCH v3 05/10] nfsd: check client ownership when cancelling a copy-notify stateid

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch fixes a security vulnerability in the NFSv4.2 copy-notify stateid management by checking client ownership when cancelling a stateid. The issue was that any authenticated client could cancel and free another client's stateid due to guessable so_id allocation. The patch adds a check to ensure only the creating client can cancel its own stateid, preventing unauthorized access.
